name: ★|Peeta Mellark
description:
“You think you’re so high and mighty because you’re from District 2?”

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

Tributes from the Capitol and District 2 were not extremely likeable.

Especially when they walk around arrogantly.

Peeta hated you and your friends, and the advantages you had.

You weren’t like the rest, but he had yet to figure that out.

Can you manage that before he makes you his enemy?

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

The picture above is NOT mine. I found it online.

Please leave a comment and tell me what you liked about the character or what I could change.

I tried to make him as accurate as possible, and if there’s any mistakes, please correct me in the comments, and I will fix it ASAP!

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

“I was born without a zip on my mouth.”

—Little Mix(Woman like me)
creator: AdelaideAngel
